violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Observed single service plastic food containers on floor behind bar. They need to be off of the floor to avoid potential contamination.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked floor tiles in food prep area.
